chunks.text: Cory 212 | ESG – Electronic Support Group Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Home > At a glance – Audio/Visual Facilities and Services > Cory 212 Cory 212 Overview 212 Cory – Zoom AV Room is a hybrid meeting space

212 Cory – Zoom AV Room is a hybrid meeting space equipped with dual 65″ displays and a Neat Bar Zoom Room system. The room is designed for simple and reliable video conferencing. The Zoom controller is wall-mounted for easy access, and the room doe

is wall-mounted for easy access, and the room does not include wired BYOD laptop connections. This space is intended for EECS faculty, staff, and approved groups. Capacity: 6–10 people Use cases: Hybrid meetings, research discussions, interviews, re

rid meetings, research discussions, interviews, remote collaboration Location: 2nd Floor, Cory Hall How to Reserve the Room Reservations are made through bCal . Add the room’s calendar address in your event: Cory-212 This room is available to EECS fa

event: Cory-212 This room is available to EECS faculty, staff, and approved groups. Technology in the Room Neat Bar Zoom Room system Wall-mounted Zoom Room controller Dual 65″ displays Integrated microphone and speaker array Neat Bar camera with aut

rophone and speaker array Neat Bar camera with auto-framing Wireless screen sharing via Zoom only (no wired USB-C/HDMI input) Quick Start Guide Start or Join a Meeting Use the wall-mounted Zoom Room Controller . Select Start or Join . Use the on-scre

ontroller . Select Start or Join . Use the on-screen keypad or select the meeting from the room calendar. Share Your Screen Use Zoom wireless screen sharing . Select Share Screen on the controller for instructions. Or share via Zoom app: Share Screen

instructions. Or share via Zoom app: Share Screen . No wired BYOD connections are available in this room. End the Meeting Tap End Meeting on the controller. Select End Meeting for All . Troubleshooting / Support Please report all issues to: esg@eecs
